title: prepR4pcm 0.4.0.9000 (development version)
text: pr_get_tree() gains resolve_polytomies branch_lengths arguments. topology comes rotl (dominant choice cross-taxon meta-analysis), user typically needs strictly bifurcating tree non-trivial branch lengths – e.g. via ape::multi2di(random = TRUE) ape::compute.brlen(method = "Grafen"). round users call manually. Now: pr_get_tree(species, source = "rotl", resolve_polytomies = TRUE, branch_lengths = "grafen") returns tree ready metafor::rma.mv(). Defaults preserve back-compat (resolve_polytomies = FALSE, branch_lengths = NULL). Refs Cinar et al. 2022 (Methods Ecol. Evol. 13:383) Pottier et al. 2022 (Ecology Letters 25:2245), use exact pattern. New: pr_phylo_cor(tree). Thin wrapper around ape::vcv(tree, corr = TRUE) turns tree phylogenetic correlation matrix accepted metafor::rma.mv(), MCMCglmm::MCMCglmm(), glmmTMB::glmmTMB(), brms::brm() random-effect structure. Accepts phylo, multiPhylo, pr_tree_result input. New vignette: “Phylogenetic meta-analysis rotl + prepR4pcm” – end--end walk species names rotl topology, bifurcating + Grafen branches, correlation matrix, metafor::rma.mv(), using 13-species cross-taxon subset Pottier et al. 2022 thermal-tolerance dataset (lampreys, bivalves, insects, fish, amphibians, reptiles, cephalopods, echinoderms). Includes “Grafen vs datelife” tradeoff discussion explaining Grafen practical default cross-taxon meta-analysis. Live tests test-meta-analysis-path.R exercise new args correlation-matrix wrapper end--end real ape calls (mocking ape ).

title: prepR4pcm 0.4.0.9000 (development version)
text: CI workflow trimmed pull_request + workflow_dispatch (: push + pull_request), Linux-default (: full macOS / Windows / Linux x 3 R-version matrix). workflow_dispatch trigger os input – set full release / CRAN submission re-run full matrix manually. Saves GitHub Actions minutes (~85% reduction) matches team’s “local checks CI” preference per CLAUDE.md. datelife moved Suggests + Remotes Enhances DESCRIPTION. Reason: datelife archived CRAN 2024 heavy transitive dep tree (bold, phylobase, Bioconductor packages) pak’s resolver install clean CI images. Enhances declares relationship R CMD check happy, pak doesn’t try auto-install . Users want datelife backend run pak::pak("phylotastic/datelife") ; runtime requireNamespace("datelife") guard .pr_get_tree_datelife() .pr_date_tree_datelife() produces clear install hint datelife missing. \pkg{datelife} references roxygen replaced \code{datelife} match new dependency status.

title: prepR4pcm 0.4.0.9000 (development version)
text: reconcile_multi() longer undercounts dataset-specific matches species appears different formats across datasets (e.g. Homo_sapiens one dataset Homo sapiens another). cascade gains multi_x = TRUE mode allows multiple x names resolve tree tip via normalisation, reconcile_multi() now uses. mapping also gains documented in_<dataset> logical columns (one per input dataset) missing implementation. changes per-dataset join match(your_data$species, mapping$name_x) reliable: every species every input dataset finds row. Refs #10 (Ayumi Mizuno). reconcile_summary() longer prints console result assigned variable. formatted report now lives returned object’s formatted_text slot renders via print.reconciliation_summary() method, R’s REPL auto-prints report function called prompt without assignment. Refs #12 (Ayumi Mizuno). README: rewritten introduction spell species-name mismatches matter PCMs, expanded worked examples mismatch type (formatting, synonymy, typos), expanded PGLS / PCM acronyms, moved Quick example Typical workflow, added inline framing prose around Quick example, fixed broken / missing links Clements checklist BirdLife-BirdTree crosswalk, added inline citation block (text + BibTeX) users don’t need run citation("prepR4pcm") see cite, clarified bundled datasets subsets full upstream sources. Refs #53 (Malgorzata Lagisz). Fixed: removed V.PhyloMaker3 Suggests Remotes – repo hallucinated Round 8 doesn’t exist GitHub (jinyizju/V.PhyloMaker3 returns 404). vphylomaker augment backend now prefers V.PhyloMaker2 (actual current version) fallback original V.PhyloMaker. fix preserves public API reconcile_augment(source = "vphylomaker").

title: prepR4pcm 0.4.0
text: release closes multi-round tree-handling overhaul started issue #42 (Ayumi Mizuno) tracked issue #48. Across Rounds 4 - 8 package gained: Five tree-retrieval backends (rotl, rtrees, clootl, fishtree, datelife) unified pr_get_tree(..., n_tree, source = "auto"). Three augmentation backends (rtrees, V.PhyloMaker3/V.PhyloMaker2, U.PhyloMaker) reconcile_augment(). standalone dating function (pr_date_tree()) adding chronogram calibrations existing topologies. Per-tree provenance metadata pairs every tree multiPhylo citation, calibration method, tip count – designed downstream consumption pigauto::multi_impute_trees(). pr_cite_tree() formatting citations (text / markdown / bibtex). pr_tree_compare() bipartition-matched branch-length correlation. pr_get_tree_status() backend health probing. -disk cache (pr_tree_cache_*) repeat retrievals. Three vignettes covering cross-package pipeline, backend comparison, original workflows.

what: Round 8: V.PhyloMaker / U.PhyloMaker + bipartition correlation + ultrametric check
title: prepR4pcm 0.4.0
text: source = "vphylomaker" – plant-alternative rtrees, via GitHub packages V.PhyloMaker3 (preferred) V.PhyloMaker2 (fallback). share phylo.maker(sp.list, tree, scenarios) API. Use want explicit V.PhyloMaker scenario control (S1 / S2 / S3, see Jin & Qian 2019/2022). source = "uphylomaker" – universal (plants + animals) alternative via U.PhyloMaker (Jin & Qian 2023, Plant Diversity). phylo.maker convention plus gen.list argument; helper auto-loads U.PhyloMaker::nodes.info.1 supplied. Bipartition-matched branch-length correlation pr_tree_compare(). previous Pearson--sorted-edges approximation replaced proper bipartition match: edge tree , corresponding edge tree B one splitting set tips. Edges whose bipartition isn’t shared dropped correlation. check_ultrametric = TRUE argument pr_get_tree(), pr_date_tree(), reconcile_augment(). producing tree, runs ape::.ultrametric() warns backend expected produce ultrametric tree didn’t. Skipped rotl (synthesis topology, real branch lengths) internal augment branch_length = "zero" (breaks ultrametricity design). modify tree – force ultrametricity, call phytools::force.ultrametric() ape::chronos() result . TimeTree.org REST client deferred non-goal. TimeTree’s TOS restricts bulk querying non-commercial use; REST wrapper isn’t clean fit prepR4pcm’s “install--go” backend model. Users need TimeTree data can fetch manually feed resulting topology pr_date_tree() (skip dating entirely).

New tests cover corrupt cache files, missing-key reads, cache invalidation taxon n_tree, tree comparisons across exotic shapes (edge lengths, 3+ trees, named arguments), min_match boundary values, end--end pipelines including pr_get_tree -> pr_cite_tree, multi-tree provenance preservation, cache save/load round-trip, auto dispatcher’s auto_attempts / auto_chose metadata.

what: Round 5: posterior-tree support and the prepR4pcm -> pigauto pipeline
title: prepR4pcm 0.4.0
text: pr_get_tree() gains unified n_tree parameter users can request posterior sample (multiPhylo) backend supports one. Default n_tree = 1L (back-compat). n_tree > 1: "rotl" – still returns 1 (synthesis tree); one-shot warning explains posterior available. "rtrees" – pass-rtrees::get_tree(n_tree = ...). "clootl" – pass-clootl::extractTree(sample.size = n_tree) multiple Clements posterior samples. "fishtree" – switches fishtree_complete_phylogeny() multi-tree stochastic polytomy resolution. "datelife" – (new backend; see ) returns one chronogram per database source, capped n_tree. New backend: pr_get_tree(source = "datelife"). Universal database pre-computed chronograms (Sanchez Reyes et al. 2024, Syst. Biol. 73:470). Returns single SDM-summary chronogram default; n_tree > 1 returns multiPhylo per-source candidate chronograms. Backend lives Suggests + Remotes (datelife archived CRAN 2024 – install pak::pak("phylotastic/datelife")). New function: pr_date_tree(tree, n_dated, ...). Wraps datelife::datelife_use() time-calibrate existing topology. Returns pr_tree_result shape pr_get_tree() downstream consumers (notably pigauto) treat retrieved dated trees interchangeably. New function: pr_cite_tree(result, format = ...). Formats citation block (text / markdown / bibtex) pr_tree_result, including per-tree source citations result multi-tree posterior. Helpful paper methods sections, figure legends, PR descriptions. Per-tree provenance metadata. Every pr_tree_result now carries backend_meta$tree_provenance: list one entry per returned tree (citation, calibration method, tip count). multiPhylo results, tree[[]] pairs naturally backend_meta$tree_provenance[[]]. Designed feed pigauto::multi_impute_trees(). Cross-package vignette: “species names phylogenetic posterior – prepR4pcm + pigauto”. End--end walkthrough showing chain reconcile_data() -> pr_get_tree() (pr_date_tree()) -> pigauto::multi_impute_trees() -> pooled inference via Rubin’s rules. vignette uses mock data eval = FALSE chunks parts need pigauto / datelife installed. Cross-link pigauto. ?pr_get_tree, ?pr_date_tree, ?reconcile_augment mention pigauto @seealso. pkgdown reference index gains “Sister package: pigauto” callout.

title: prepR4pcm 0.4.0
text: reconcile_augment() gains source = c("internal", "rtrees") (default "internal", existing genus-level grafting behaviour) taxon arguments. source = "rtrees", grafting delegated rtrees::get_tree(tree_by_user = TRUE), uses tree backbone lets rtrees’ taxon-specific reference tree place missing species via genus / family information. Helpful genus absent tree present rtrees’ reference – internal mode skip . Returns result shape (meta$source recording backend used). Refs #42 (Ayumi Mizuno). pr_get_tree() gains fourth backend, source = "fishtree", exposing time-calibrated fish-phylogeny Rabosky et al. (2018, Nature 559:392) via CRAN package . Returns chronogram default; pass type = "phylogram" uncalibrated version. Captures fishtree’s warning text backend_meta$warnings matched/unmatched report honest. pr_get_tree() connects reconciled species list external phylogenetic resource returns pruned candidate tree plus matching report (matched / unmatched / source / backend metadata). Four backends ship: "rotl" – Open Tree Life synthesis tree (universal coverage, via CRAN package ). "rtrees" – taxon-specific mega-trees (bird, mammal, fish, amphibian, reptile, plant, shark/ray, bee, butterfly), via GitHub package  (pak::pak("daijiang/rtrees")). "clootl" – bird-phylogenies current Clements taxonomy, via GitHub package  (pak::pak("eliotmiller/clootl")). "fishtree" – fish-time-calibrated phylogeny, via CRAN package . Accepts reconciliation object, character vector, data frame input. backend loaded demand – asking backend don’t installed produces helpful migration error install command. Refs #42 (Ayumi Mizuno).

title: prepR4pcm 0.4.0
text: Added combinatorial test layer stresses parameter combinations rather single cases. Three new test files (test-authority-mocked.R, test-workflows.R, test-robustness.R) parametric grid extensions nine existing files take suite ~311 expectations 1,868 expectations across 252 test_that() blocks (0 failures). Every historical bug shipped — #495 cartesian merge explosion, drop_unresolved -op, diacritics regex failure, factor coercion, silent multi-phylo handling — lived parameter combinations single-axis tests never exercised. new layer tests combinations asserts invariants (row counts, NA counts, tree tip counts, set membership, S3 class, idempotence). test-authority-mocked.R stubs pr_lookup_authority() via local_mocked_bindings() synonym-resolution branch exercised without hitting taxadb network, covering accepted→synonym, synonym→accepted, neither-found, network-error scenarios col / itis / gbif / ncbi. test-workflows.R chains functions end--end way real users , including #495 asymmetric pattern (750 shared / 96 only_x / 10,400 only_y). test-robustness.R covers adversarial inputs: empty data, -NA species columns, factor columns, Unicode (diacritics Japanese kana), minimal 1-row/1-tip cases, large-input smoke tests, invalid types, malformed arguments.

title: prepR4pcm 0.3.0
text: reconcile_report() generates self-contained HTML report documenting name-matching decisions — suitable sharing archiving. reconcile_merge() joins two reconciled datasets single analysis-ready data frame using mapping table reconcile_data(). reconcile_augment() grafts unresolved species onto tree using genus-level placement (sister congener MRCA congeners). reconcile_splits_lumps() detects taxonomic splits lumps synonym resolution results. Fuzzy matching via fuzzy = TRUE catches likely typos using component-based Levenshtein similarity. resolve = "flag" marks low-confidence matches manual review. reconcile_plot() visualises match composition bar chart pie chart using base R graphics. reconcile_suggest() shows closest fuzzy candidates unresolved species — useful finding near-misses. reconcile_diff() compares two reconciliation objects reports gained/lost matches, type changes, target changes. reconcile_override_batch() applies multiple overrides data frame CSV file. reconcile_review() provides interactive console interface accepting rejecting flagged fuzzy matches one time. print.reconciliation() now shows coverage bar: [████████████████████░░░░░░░░░░] 71% (657/919). Stage-level progress messages large datasets (> 500 species) matching cascade.

title: prepR4pcm 0.3.0
text: Example datasets expanded ~200 ~920 species (Corvoidea + allied passerine families) realistic demonstrations. \dontrun{} examples replaced runnable examples using bundled data.

title: prepR4pcm 0.3.0
text: Fuzzy matching (pr_fuzzy_match()) now uses genus pre-filtering: species whose genus within 2 edits compared. reduces computation O(n×m) roughly O(n×k) k number congeners+near-genera, giving ~100× speedup large datasets (e.g., 1360×6504 >10 min ~3 sec). reconcile_suggest() uses genus pre-filter vectorised adist(), making usable 1000+ unresolved species.

title: prepR4pcm 0.3.0
text: Fixed crosswalk overrides effect. cascade’s override pre-stage required exact string matches override names input names. override names used spaces tree tips used underscores (vice versa), overrides applied. Overrides now normalise sides comparison. Fixed reconcile_plot() error passing main argument: internal pr_plot_bar() hardcoded main also passed ..., causing duplicate argument error. Fixed .Rbuildignore patterns excluded .rda data files case-insensitive filesystems.
